zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Langenmantel von Sparren於1314年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 洛塔爾-易恩爾巴賀時，她的父親Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II40歲，母親Anna Lopp34歲。她於1334年與Heinrich Bach III.在德國貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1388年之後在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格斯馬沙奧森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Langenmantel von Sparren于1314年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 洛塔爾-易恩爾巴賀时，她的父亲Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II40岁，母亲Anna Lopp34岁。她于1334年与Heinrich Bach III.在德国貝也奧斯包格奧斯包格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1388年之后在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格斯馬沙奧森。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sparren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Perrin
meanings: French and English: from the Old French and Middle English personal name Perrin, a pet form of Old French Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perine , Perrine , and Prine .

History: Henri Perrin from Louargat in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany (France), married Jeanne Merrin in Montreal, QC, in 1661. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variants or altered forms Perrine and Pareyn) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of the Huguenot ancestors was Daniel Perrin (1642–1719), nicknamed The Huguenot, who arrived in New York in 1665, aboard the Philip, and settled first in NJ and later on Staten Island. Among his descendants the surname is common in the altered forms Perrine, Perine and Prine. The Staten Island community of Huguenot is named after Daniel Perrin and other Huguenots who settled in the area during the late 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Langenmantel von Sparren was born in 1314, in Julbach, Rottal-Inn, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II, was 40 and her mother, Anna Lopp, was 34. She married Heinrich Bach III. in 1334, in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1388, in Zusmarshausen, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Langenmantel von Sparren est née en 1314, à Julbach, Landkreis Rottal-Inn, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Anna Lopp, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich Bach III. en 1334, à Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1388, à Zusmarshausen, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Langenmantel von Sparren 1314 in Julbach, Landkreis Rottal-Inn, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II 40 und ihre Mutter Anna Lopp 34. Sie hat 1334 in Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland Heinrich Bach III. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1388 in Zusmarshausen, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Langenmantel von Sparren è nata il nel 1314 nel Julbach, Landkreis Rottal-Inn, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Anna Lopp, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich Bach III. nel 1334, nel Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1388, nel Zusmarshausen, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Langenmantel von Sparrenが1314年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ロッタル-インジュルバチで生まれた時，父Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren IIは40歳，母Anna Loppは34歳であった。1334年にドイツバイエルンアウグスブルグアウグスブルグでHeinrich Bach III.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1388年以後にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アウグスブルグズスマーシャウセンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Langenmantel von Sparren(이)가 1314년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 로탤-이 줄바치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Lopp(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1334년 독일 베이른 오그스버그 오그스버그에서 Heinrich Bach III.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 이후 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 오그스버그 주스마쇼센에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Langenmantel von Sparren nasceu em 1314, em Julbach, Landkreis Rottal-Inn, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Anna Lopp, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich Bach III. em 1334, em Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1388, em Zusmarshausen, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Langenmantel von Sparren родилась в 1314 г. в местности джулбач, ландкрис роттал-инн, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Lopp, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich Bach III. в 1334 г. в местности аугсбург, аугсбург, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1388 г. в местности зусмаршаусен, ландкрис аугсбург, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Langenmantel von Sparren nació en 1314, en Julbach, Landkreis Rottal-Inn, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich Langenmantel von Sparren II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Anna Lopp, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Heinrich Bach III. en 1334, en Augsburg, Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1388, en Zusmarshausen, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania.
